Title: @evomap/evolver: Path Traversal in `evolver fetch` default-branch `safeId` allows Hub-controlled overwrite of project files (RCE)
Description: The `evolver fetch` subcommand in `index.js` writes Hub-supplied `bundled_files[]` into a directory derived from a Hub-supplied `skill_id`. When `--out` is not used, the path-sanitizing regex permits `.` characters, allowing a `skill_id` of `..` to escape the `skills/` subdirectory and resolve to the user's current working directory. Combined with the file-extension allow-list (which includes `.js`/`.json`/`.sh`/`.py`/`.md`), this lets a malicious Hub overwrite the victim's `index.js`, `package.json`, or other files in cwd, achieving remote code execution on the next invocation of the evolver.
